title: Add decomposed logging system with formatter, transport, and rotation
description: Create a logging system with: (1) log formatter in src/utils/log-formatter.ts supporting JSON and text output modes, (2) log transport in src/services/logTransport.ts with console and file transports, (3) log rotation utility in src/utils/log-rotation.ts with size-based rotation, and (4) integration tests for the full logging pipeline. This decomposes logging into separate modules rather than the existing bundled logger in src/utils/logger/index.ts.
existing_patterns: src/utils/logger/index.ts - Contains existing jsonFormatter, prettyFormatter, consoleTransport, and fileTransport that can inform the new implementations
src/utils/logger/logger.test.ts - Contains test patterns for log formatters and transports using Vitest with fs mocks
src/middleware/request-logger.ts - Shows how logging is currently used as middleware
questions: Should this new logging system replace the existing logger in src/utils/logger/index.ts or coexist as a separate module?
What size threshold should trigger log rotation (e.g., 10MB per file)?
Should log rotation create a fixed number of backup files or use a time-based retention policy?
